parameters.query: SELECT account_id, username FROM accounts WHERE platform = 'youtube' AND active = true

=INSERT INTO accounts (account_id, platform, username, display_name, followers_count, metadata, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.account_id }}',
  'youtube',
  '{{ $json.username }}',
  '{{ $json.display_name }}',
  {{ $json.followers_count }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metadata) }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (account_id) DO UPDATE SET
  username = EXCLUDED.username,
  display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name,
  followers_count = EXCLUDED.followers_count,
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata,
  updated_at = NOW();

nodes.name: Fetch Recent Videos
nodes.notes: Get last 50 videos from uploads playlist

parameters.query:
=-- Insert content
INSERT INTO content (content_id, account_id, platform, content_type, title, hook, idea, url, posted_at, duration_sec, metadata)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.content_id }}',
  '{{ $json.account_id }}',
  '{{ $json.platform }}',
  '{{ $json.content_type }}',
  '{{ $json.title }}',
  '{{ $json.hook }}',
  '{{ $json.idea }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.posted_at }}',
  {{ $json.duration_sec }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metadata) }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (content_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  duration_sec = EXCLUDED.duration_sec,
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata;

-- Insert metrics
INSERT INTO metrics_daily (content_id, account_id, date, views, likes, comments, shares, saves)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.content_id }}',
  '{{ $json.account_id }}',
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.views }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.saves }}
)
ON CONFLICT (content_id, date) DO UPDATE SET
  views = EXCLUDED.views,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  created_at = NOW();
